system.description: The character can perform extraordinary feats of agility, including walking tightropes, tumbling, and dodging attacks in acrobatic style.
The character is able to use all of their senses to perceive the world around them. Used for noticing hidden enemies, detecting ambushes, and other perceptive tasks.
The character knows how to haggle and trade, getting the best deal in any commercial exchange.
The character can talk so fast and say so much that others cannot keep up, confusing them with words.
The character can drink and revel with the best of them, resisting the ill effects of alcohol and social lubricants.
The character uses their personality and good looks to influence others, making them more friendly and cooperative.
The character has knowledge of chemicals and drugs, both their manufacture and their effects on the human body.
The character can encode and decode secret messages using a particular cipher system. Common ciphers include Acolyte, Inquisition, and Underworld.
The character can scale walls, cliffs, and other vertical surfaces.
The character can direct others in combat and other situations, giving orders that others will follow.
The character understands the complexities of trade and commerce at a high level, including Profit Factor acquisition rolls and trade negotiation.
The character has common knowledge about a particular subject. Subjects include: Administratum, Adeptus Arbites, Imperial Creed, Imperial Guard, Imperium, Machine Cult, Rogue Traders, War, etc.
The character can hide themselves and others, as well as concealing objects.
The character can escape from bonds and squeeze through tight spaces.
The character can lie convincingly and maintain false identities.
The character understands explosives and can place and detonate them for maximum effect.
The character can alter their appearance to resemble another person.
The character can react to incoming attacks, diving out of the way at the last moment. Used as a Reaction to negate hits.
The character can operate a particular type of ground vehicle. Types include: Ground Vehicle, Skimmer, Walker.
The character can accurately assess the value of goods, including antiques, weapons, and other items.
The character has knowledge of dangerous and proscribed subjects. Types include: Chaos, Daemonology, Heresy, Inquisition, Mutants, Psykers, Warp, Xenos.
The character understands games of chance and can play them well.
The character can gather information by asking questions, making contacts, and finding information through social means.
The character can extract information from unwilling subjects.
The character can use physical presence and implied violence to coerce others into compliance.
The character can focus their mind for psychic power use, gaining bonuses to Focus Power tests.
The character can understand what someone is saying by reading their lips at a distance.
The character can read and write in Low Gothic (the common language of the Imperium). A basic but crucial skill — many in the 41st Millennium are illiterate.
The character can solve puzzles, recognise patterns, and reason through problems using deductive thinking.
The character understands medicine and first aid. Used to treat injuries, administer drugs, and diagnose illness.
The character can navigate using celestial bodies, charts, or instruments. Types: Surface, Stellar, Warp.
The character is skilled in a particular performing art. Types: Dancer, Musician, Singer, Storyteller.
The character can operate a particular type of aircraft or spacecraft. Types: Flyers, Military Craft, Spacecraft.
The character can sense the presence of psychic phenomena, Warp entities, and psykers. Only available to psykers.

The character has in-depth academic knowledge of a subject. Types include: Astromancy, Beasts, Bureaucracy, Chymistry, Cryptology, Heraldry, Imperial Warrants, Judgement, Navigation, Numerology, Occult, Philosophy, Tactica Imperialis.
The character can read people and situations, detecting lies and noticing subtle cues in behaviour.
The character can methodically search an area for hidden items, secret doors, or concealed enemies.
The character knows a specialised secret language. Types: Acolyte, Administratum, Astropath, Military, Navigator, Rogue Trader, Tech, Underworld.
The character can bypass electronic locks, alarms, and security systems.
The character can follow a target without being noticed.
The character can move without making noise, avoiding detection by sound.
The character can palm objects, pick pockets, and perform other manual deceptions.
The character can speak a particular language. Common languages include: High Gothic, Low Gothic, Eldar, Ork, Tau, Techna-Lingua, Trader's Cant.
The character can survive in hostile environments, finding food and water, building shelters, and avoiding natural dangers.
The character can swim effectively in water or other liquids.
The character can operate and repair technological devices. Essential for working with mechandrite systems, weapons maintenance, and voidship systems.
The character can follow the trail of a person or creature across various terrains.

The character is skilled in a particular trade or craft. Types: Apothecary, Armourer, Astronomer, Chymist, Cryptographer, Explorator, Merchant, Remembrancer, Shipwright, Soothsayer, Technomat, Voidfarer.
The character can handle, train, and ride animals.
